_doc: Day-by-day Balkan road trip city map (2026-03). All entries are derived from EXIF GPS on the actual photos at G:\Poze\IMG2026MMDD*.jpg — every photo on every trip date carried real EXIF GPS, so no synthesis was required. Coordinates are the daily centroid of the day's distinct GPS clusters; place names are reverse-geocoded via Nominatim (cached in scripts/.geocode-cache.json).

2026-03-12.note: Schleswig-Holstein roadside / overnight stop. Hannover stop expected by itinerary not captured on camera.

2026-03-14.centroidNote: Day spans Prague (50.08/14.43 morning), Bratislava (48.14/17.11 mid), Vecsés/Budapest (47.41/19.25 evening). Catalogue rows split per cluster.

2026-03-15.note: South-Hungary lunch / fuel stop on the way to Romania.

2026-03-16.note: Olt valley town, between Sibiu and Bucharest. The Sibiu stop expected by itinerary was a drive-through; photos start south of it.

2026-03-22.note: Zero source photos on this date; presumably an offline travel day Bucharest -> Kladovo region.

2026-03-28.centroidNote: Mar 28 spans Dachau (already catalogued, 48.27/11.47), Nuremberg (49.43/11.11 newly added) and Kassel (51.31/9.49 newly added).

2026-03-29.centroidNote: Burgwedel (52.49/9.85) already catalogued; Aarhus arrival (56.20/10.23) added by this backfill.
